title: Shocking New AI Just Hit 12 Million Tokens With 1000x Less Compute
summary: Subquadratic released SubQ, a model claiming 12 million token context window with approximately 1000x reduction in attention compute compared to standard approaches. The company uses Sparse Selective Attention (SSA) to enable practical long-context reasoning over full documents, codebases, and contracts without retrieval-augmented generation.
